hero.title: See anime in a completely new way with amaterasu
hero.description: Here you'll find anime merchandise from any universe, and you can also order posters, stickers, and much more with your own unique design.

customOrder.title: with your design
customOrder.description: This product is made individually with your custom design. You can share your idea, and we will prepare a mockup and confirm it with you before production.
customOrder.uploadSubtitle: Drag and drop a file here or click to select
customOrder.uploadHint: Upload an image to see how it will look on your product. This is just a preview — we will prepare the final mockup after confirmation.
customOrder.errorInvalidFormat: Please upload an image in JPG, PNG, or WEBP format
customOrder.errorFileSize: File size exceeds 10 MB. Please select a smaller file
customOrder.howText: Send us your reference/idea and requirements in Telegram. We clarify details, prepare a preview, and start production after your approval.
customOrder.termsText: Final price and production time depend on design complexity and quantity. Estimated production time is 1–3 business days.
customOrder.contactText: To place a custom order, click the button below and message us on Telegram.

delivery.title: Delivery and Payment
delivery.subtitle: Fast, convenient, and reliable — we deliver across Ukraine
delivery.delivery1: Nova Poshta delivery across Ukraine — 1–3 business days.
delivery.delivery3: Delivery is available within Ukraine only.
delivery.payment2: Cash on delivery at Nova Poshta.
delivery.returnText: Returns within 14 days if the product and packaging are intact. Contact support for details in
delivery.splitParcels: Some items ship directly from our suppliers, so your order may be split into multiple parcels. We always strive to make delivery as cost-effective as possible for you.
delivery.splitParcelsManager: To find out whether your shipment will come from one location or be split into multiple parcels — contact our manager on Telegram to confirm your order details.
delivery.questionsText: Message us on Telegram — we reply within an hour during business hours.

contacts.title: Contacts
contacts.subtitle: Get in touch — we're happy to help
contacts.legalAddress: Ukraine, 1, Odesa region, Bilhorod-Dnistrovskyi district, Bilhorod-Dnistrovskyi city, Lomonosova St., building 2, apt. 30
contacts.fastReplyText: Telegram is the fastest way to get a response. We usually reply within 15 minutes.
